_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: Codes for the representation of names of scripts

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: [ISO 15924]([ISO 15924 - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_15924)) is an [international standard](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_standard "ISO standard") defining codes for [writing systems](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Writing_systems "Writing systems") or *scripts* (a *set of graphic characters used for the written form of one or more languages*).
